verdicts.reason: The slide reordering logic, including currentSlide adjustment and fragment reset, is consistent with previously verified and approved functionality. The new sorter view uses established rendering patterns and correctly handles edge cases like empty decks.
The Slide Sorter View reuses existing, constrained rendering and data handling patterns without introducing new attack surfaces or external content vectors.
The slide sorter view provides clear affordances, keyboard navigation, and responsive design, making it intuitive for first-time users.
The Slide Sorter View is highly discoverable through its toolbar button tooltip, in-modal hints, and comprehensive documentation for both human users and AI agents.
The slide sorter provides a highly intuitive and efficient way to visually reorder and navigate slides, addressing a core workflow need for presentation creators.
verdicts.evidence: This feature is a standard and expected utility in modern presentation software (e.g., PowerPoint, Keynote, Google Slides) and significantly improves the editing experience for multi-slide decks by offering visual drag-and-drop reordering and quick navigation, which is superior to manual text manipulation.
